description: Explicit WikiHow category-label normalization decisions derived from the Turn 1 inventory and semantic review. Only category labels are normalized; source text fields are preserved.

semantic_review.chunk_strategy: Grouped by category root/path family into 24 chunks of 156-250 labels, plus one cross-root lexical-hint review.

aliases.reason: Both labels denote facial mask or pack preparations under the same Facial Preparations scope; the Face Packs sample is a face-pack recipe matching the Face Masks category scope.
Both labels describe the health effects of mold exposure; the source labels differ by word order.
Both labels denote the same movie genre/category; samples for both concern scary or horror movies without a distinguishable scope difference.

kept_separate.reason: Basketball denotes the sport and related team/school/college category, while Basketballs denotes basketball gear/equipment.
Crab denotes food and seafood recipe scope, while Crabs denotes animals/crustaceans as pets or wildlife.
Python denotes the programming language category, while Pythons denotes snake/reptile animal care scope.
Games is broader than Video Games.
These are hierarchical or platform/scope subdivisions, not aliases.
The labels are similar, but the paths show separate WikiHow categories with different article scopes.
Parent category and two distinct child craft scopes.
Photography is the broad practice/category; Photographs covers photo objects and related handling.
Curly Hair is a hair texture category, while Curling Hair is the process of creating curls.
These are related coloring scopes but not identical: bleaching is a method, lightening is broader, and dyeing blond is a target color category.
Fake Tans is the broader sunless/artificial tanning category, while Self Tanner is a narrower product/application subcategory.
Footwear includes shoes plus boots, sandals, slippers, high heels, and other footwear categories.
Empathy appears as a narrower child category under Sympathy.
Vegetarian Health and Vegetarian Diets occur in different branches and denote health guidance versus lifestyle diet category scope.
Parent disease category versus the specific type 2 subtype.
These are related hierarchy levels or subareas, not the same scope.
These are adjacent programming or markup scopes but denote different hierarchy levels or different languages.
Related phone categories, but Telephones is broader and Cell Phones/Smartphones are distinct device scopes.
Near-synonymous wording, but the paths show a parent media/topic category and a more specific podcasting subcategory.
Related and overlapping topics, but the labels represent different scopes.
Animated GIF is shown as a narrower child category under GIF.
Cosplay involves character/fandom portrayal, while Costumes is a broader costume-making and dressing category.
These are nested but distinct scopes: general behavior, problem behaviors, and training topics.
Both are baked bread products, but the taxonomy places them at different scopes.
Vegan is a stricter dietary scope nested under Vegetarian.
These are hierarchical beverage categories with different breadth.
Cleaning is the broader housekeeping category, while House Cleaning is narrower.
The data shows Drywall as a child category under the broader Drywall Plasterboard and Gyprock category.
Homework is broader; Homework Skills is nested beneath it with a narrower skill-focused scope.
Translation and interpretation are related language services but distinct scopes.
Combat Sports is a broader parent category that includes martial arts plus other fighting sports.
Diving is broader and also includes platform/acrobatics diving, while Underwater Diving is a specific subcategory.
Finance and Business is the root category, while Business is a narrower subcategory within it.
These form a hierarchy from general real estate to property buying to house buying.
These are nested but distinct scopes.
Amphibian is the broader category; the others are taxonomic subcategories within it.
These denote different destinations: Washington, D.C. versus Washington state.
New York Travel is broader state-level travel; New York City Travel is city-specific.
Home Decorating is the broader parent category; Home Decor is a narrower subcategory within it.
Middle ear infections are a specific subtype of ear infections.
Decorating for Christmas covers the activity/theme broadly; Christmas Decorations is narrower for decoration items.
National Days is general, while National Days (USA) is region-specific.
Both concern social conduct, but the chunk treats them as distinct category scopes with different path labels.
Hockey is the broader parent category, while the others are sport-specific subcategories.
